response: I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to you because I have found the research areas of your chair very appealing and in line with my interests. I am therefore very honored and interested in joining your chair if you have any available research positions (e.g., visiting researcher). I am currently a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen, Germany, conducting funded research projects on digital health (i.e., digital therapeutic apps for mental health) and digital health transformation. I would like to share my short bio with you. I received my Ph.D. in IT Management in 2015 from the University of Technology Malaysia, jointly with the University of Nebraska, Omaha (USA). My work has led to over 15 papers in peer-reviewed journals and more than 25 papers in refereed conferences on topics such as IT-business Strategic Alignment, IT flexibility, IT Capabilities, Customer Satisfaction, Information Systems Success, and Communication Effectiveness. My recent interest has led me to research more into the areas of digital transformation and digital health.
